creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I understand. To be clear, I did not remove it.

I am also unsure as to how to include Author. From what I understand, that's a git field. I'll have to look into it. I suspect it's something I have to set explicitly. I'm sure it's not something which comes through in the patch process, unless I'm patching incorrectly.

If you know how to accomplish this, I'm all ears.

Thank you.
